conditions.name: Ablaze
conditions.description: You are on fire and take damage each round until the flames are put out.

conditions.name: Bleeding
conditions.description: An open wound drains you, costing Wounds each round until staunched.

conditions.name: Blinded
conditions.description: You cannot see, failing tests that rely on sight and fighting at a penalty.

conditions.name: Broken
conditions.description: Your nerve has failed; you flee or cower and cannot take aggressive actions.

conditions.name: Deafened
conditions.description: You cannot hear, failing tests that rely on sound.

conditions.name: Entangled
conditions.description: You are caught or grappled and cannot move until you break free.

conditions.name: Fatigued
conditions.description: You are tired, suffering a penalty to all tests until you rest.

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.description: A toxin courses through you, costing Wounds each round until it passes.

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.description: You are knocked down and must spend an action to stand.

conditions.name: Stunned
conditions.description: You are dazed and reeling, suffering a penalty and unable to act effectively.

conditions.name: Surprised
conditions.description: You were caught off guard and cannot react until the surprise passes.

conditions.name: Unconscious
conditions.description: You are knocked out and helpless until you recover your senses.

criticals.name: Bruised Muscle
criticals.effect: Painful throb. −10 to physical tests for 1 round.

criticals.name: Crushed Bone
criticals.effect: A grinding crack. −10 to all tests using that location.

criticals.name: Torn Tendon
criticals.effect: Movement halved when the location is used.

notes.title: Sin thresholds and penalties
notes.body: Sin 1 → −10 Faith. Sin 3 → harder spellcasting. Sin 5 → punitive event.

notes.title: Minor Miscast table
notes.body: Roll d100, apply the listed effect. The GM may flavour it.

notes.title: Fear & Terror thresholds
notes.body: WP test; on failure the Broken condition.

notes.title: Our group: 1 Fate per scene
notes.body: A Fate refreshes at the start of every scene to keep things moving.

notes.title: Eberfeld road encounters
notes.body: Encounter table for the Eberfeld–Ubersreik road.

notes.title: Sigmund's personal Sin list
notes.body: Specific deeds that count as Sin for a Sigmar follower.
